Off Calendar Jan-06-2023 Continued To Jan-13-23 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 611
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL OF CALIFORNIA MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication.

Parties have provided some but not all paper courtesy copies of filings. See Local Rule 2.7(B). The matter is continued to Friday January 13, 2023 at 3:00 p.m. in department 611 before Judge Curtis Karnow. Each party must, not later than Noon Friday January 6, 2023, provide to Department 302 paper courtesy copies of every filing made by that party in connection with the motion.

Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/ck)
